creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #4)
It was "near" clean install: removed all ruby gems and gitlab ports, upgrade base from 12.2 to 13.0, rebuild all ports, install gitlab, recreated database.
But rubygem-grpc142 silently grabs devel/grpc instead of trying to install devel/grpc142.
